div.head: The Secretary of State to the United States Representative on the Council of the Organization of American States (Daniels), at Washington
div.p: The Secretary of State encloses herewith, for transmission by the United States Representative on the Council of the Organization of American States to the Director General of the Pan American Union for deposit, the instrument of ratification signed by the President on May 14, 1948 of a protocol, dated at Washington October 1, 1947, for the extension of the Inter-American Coffee Agreement for one year from October 1, 1947.For text, see Department of State Treaties and Other International Acts Series No. 1768, or 62 Stat. (pt. 2) 1658.
